projects.goal: Drive Nanobot eeepc to a stable autonomous owner/control loop and out of quality-blocker stagnation.
projects.dispatch_gap_reason: Active project exists but there is no live executor and no queued, in-progress, or waiting bounded execution slice. Treat this as a control-gap incident, not a neutral status.
projects.dispatch_gap_next_action_summary: Create or enqueue the next bounded execution slice immediately; until a bounded slice exists, keep the project in waiting_for_dispatch instead of claiming in_progress.
projects.owner_loop_reactivation_reason: Create the next truthful bounded execution slice, dispatch it, and promote the project owner loop back to in_progress.

projects.goal: Turn Hermes into an autonomous orchestrator with transparent status reporting and durable control loops.

projects.goal: Continue improving the Nanobot ops dashboard as an operator console.
